OpsBuddy Operator Guide Internal Use Only · 2026
Page 1

How to Access OpsBuddy

Open OpsBuddy in the TULU app

OpsBuddy is built into the TULU app. Find it in the menu and tap to begin your visit.

⚠ Always Update TULU App Before Each Visit New features are released regularly. Make sure you have the latest version for the best experience and access to new features.
1
Open the TULU app on your phone
2
Tap the menu icon (☰) in the corner
3
Find the purple OpsBuddy button
4
Tap to start your visit
📱 App Store 🤖 Google Play
OpsBuddy Operator Guide How to Access OpsBuddy
Page 2

Your OpsBuddy Home

Welcome to your shift

When you open OpsBuddy, you'll see your greeting, building assignments, and quick access buttons.

⚠ Important: Messages Tab Not Active The Messages tab is currently not active. All communication with your Area Manager should be via Slack. You will have a dedicated channel for direct communication.
1
See your name and shift date
2
View your profile information
3
Access schedule and assignments
4
Tap "Go to Schedule" to view buildings
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Your OpsBuddy Home
Page 3

Your Profile

Track your performance

Your profile shows your stats: visits completed, hours worked, and earnings.

⚠ Important: Mockup Data Only This is currently a mockup interface. Real data will be connected later. The actual visit counts, hours, and earnings will display once the system is fully integrated.
📍
Visits YTD
Total visits completed
⏱
Hours Worked
Total hours tracked
💰
Earnings
Total earned
💳
Payment Method
View and manage payouts
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Your Profile
Page 4

Select Your Building

Choose where you're visiting

Your schedule shows all assigned buildings for the day.

1
See all assigned buildings
2
Check the building address
3
Tap the info icon for details (hours, WiFi, contacts)
4
Tap the building to start visit
💡 Building Details The info icon provides operating hours, unit location, backroom access, WiFi details, and emergency contacts.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Select Your Building
Page 5

Building Details

Everything you need to know

Tap the info icon to see building details: hours, unit location, backroom/storage, WiFi, and emergency contacts.

🕐
Operating Hours
When the building is open
📍
Unit Location
Where TULU units are located
🔑
Backroom/Storage
How to access storage
📦
Package Delivery
Where packages arrive
📶
WiFi Information
Network and password
☎️
Emergency Contacts
Building team numbers
⚠ Important Save this information for reference. Call if you have access issues.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Building Details
Page 6

Report an Issue

Flag problems immediately

Found a problem? Tap the red triangle icon to report it with category, description, and photos.

1
Tap the red triangle icon
2
Select the issue category
3
Write a detailed description
4
Attach photos or videos (optional)
5
Tap "Submit Issue"
⚠ Package Issues Report any issues via the issue section if delivery came expired, damaged, or with other problems.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Report an Issue
Page 7

Before You Start

Review pre-visit information

Before beginning check-in, review critical information about tasks, stock issues, and packages.

✅
Total Tasks
Tasks to complete
📦
Out of Stock
Products needing restock
🔧
Out of Service
Rental items unavailable
📮
Packages Waiting
Packages for check-in
💡 Tip Review these numbers before starting. They help you plan your visit workflow.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Before You Start
Page 8

Check-In Section

Verify location and packages

Start with check-in: verify your location, select packages that arrived, and mark their status.

1
Tap "Verify My Location" when on-site
2
Check "Due" packages tab
3
For each package, select status
4
Mark quantities for received items
5
Tap "Next" to proceed to Shop
📝 Package Issues Report any issues via the issue section if delivery came expired, damaged, or with other problems.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Check-In Section
Page 9

Shop Restock

Update inventory levels

Count shop products and update inventory. Accurate counts ensure proper restocking.

1
See out-of-stock items marked in red
2
Use + and − buttons to adjust quantities
3
Tap "Adjust Stock" to confirm changes
4
Check all categories
5
Tap "Next" when complete
⚠ Important: Inventory Best Practices • Make sure to check that there are no expired items in the unit before restocking
• Move items from backroom to the unit once item is restocked
• Count items carefully. Red items trigger restocking orders.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Shop Restock
Page 10

Rental Checkups

Inspect rental items

Physically inspect each rental item. Complete maintenance checklists for each item's condition.

1
Go to each unit and find the rental item
2
Tap "Open Door" button
3
Complete all maintenance tasks
4
Mark each task as "Valid" or "Not Valid"
5
Add photos if condition is critical
⚠ Handling "Not Valid" Issues If you choose "Not Valid", an AI agent will ask specific questions to help you figure out the issue. Please provide as much detail as possible to try to fix it on-site. If resolution isn't possible, make sure to add all relevant photos/videos to help our team assist you.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Rental Checkups
Page 11

Supplies & Parts

Inventory level verification

Update supplies and parts inventory. Track unit and backroom stock separately.

1
View all supplies and accessories
2
Track Unit and Backroom quantities separately
3
Use + button to adjust counts
4
Tap "Confirm" when complete
5
Complete all items before moving to Print
⚠ Important: Maintain Correct Inventory Levels Always keep the correct inventory level for each item. Once levels get low, our procurement team will place orders for additional parts automatically.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Supplies & Parts
Page 12

Printer Verification

Check printer health and supplies

Verify printer is operational and check ink/toner levels before moving to unit checks.

1
See printer details and last print job
2
Report the ink level for each color. If less than 20%, our procurement team will place an order for it.
🖨️ Printer Maintenance Low toner triggers automatic reorder. Always verify and report toner levels accurately.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Printer Verification
Page 13

Unit & Backroom Checks

Complete comprehensive inspections

Inspect units, backroom, custom tasks, and accessories. Document any issues or damage.

1
Review all check categories
2
Adjust quantities to match what you see
3
Mark items as "Confirm" when verified
4
Take photos of problem areas after maintenance (high quality)
5
Proceed when all checks complete
📷 Photo Documentation Make sure to add high quality photos after maintenance in tasks where required. Clear, well-lit photos help our team understand issues better.
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Unit & Backroom Checks
Page 14

Visit Summary

Review & finalize your visit

Review all completed sections. This is your final chance to check everything before submitting.

1
See Time Spent (actual vs estimated) — Note: this is currently not 100% accurate. All hours need to be submitted via DEEL platform by the last day of each month to ensure you receive payment by the 5th of next month for the previous month.
2
Review all section completion status
3
Add "Additional Comments" if needed
4
Verify you're "Ready to Check Out"
5
Tap "Complete Visit" to submit
✅ Final Checklist All sections done? Location verified? Then submit!
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Visit Summary
Page 15

Quick Reference

Everything at a glance

Before Every Visit

✓
Update TULU app to latest version
✓
Charge phone to 80%+ battery
✓
Test WiFi connection
✓
Review building assignment

Key Reminders

⚠️
Don't confirm check-in until on-site
⚠️
Count inventory carefully
⚠️
Report issues via red triangle
⚠️
Submit visit same day
🎯 Your Success Is Our Priority You're the eyes and ears on the ground. Your thorough work ensures guests have great experiences. Thank you for your attention to detail!
OpsBuddy Operator Guide Quick Reference
